AdminUsers.pageDescription: Platform managing 5 roles: customer, specialist, reviewer, coordinator_admin and super_admin.

AdminWorkspaces.pageDescription: Each SME has their own workspace to display membership and reduce cross-tenant data exposure risk.

AdminRequests.pageDescription: Request status is displayed from backend-owned workflow, not editable via raw dropdown.
